//: E-18 TEST-ONLY updater E2E overlay. Deep-merged via the Tauri CLI --config flag by the local E2E script (scripts/updater-e2e.md) and NEVER merged into the committed production tauri.conf.json. It (1) opts into plain-http transport via dangerousInsecureTransportProtocol (Tauri v2 production builds enforce TLS on updater endpoints, so a http://localhost channel needs this test-only opt-in), (2) points the endpoint at a local file server, and (3) carries a DISPOSABLE test pubkey sentinel that the E2E script replaces at runtime with a freshly generated throwaway public key (the disposable key never ships). It also flips createUpdaterArtifacts on so the local build produces the updater artifact + .sig. This file is committed but INERT unless explicitly passed. The production config must contain NONE of these markers - enforced by the config-hygiene gate (src-tauri/src/updates.rs config_is_production_clean + the pre-tag runbook grep). The live GitHub Releases endpoint CANNOT be exercised while the repo is private; that is a public-flip checklist item.
